metadata.description: Minimal Claude marketplace for exercising a canonical Cowork mise owner plugin plus a lightweight sibling consumer plugin.

plugins.name: sa-mise
plugins.description: Canonical Cowork fixture that owns the generated mise shim, shared runtime bootstrap flow, and SessionStart prompt injection.

plugins.name: sa-mise-user
plugins.description: Lightweight Cowork fixture that does not ship its own binary and instead resolves the sibling sa-mise plugin before running authored hooks.
